required_evidence: Source-provided patient_id or donor_id and sample_id fields mapped to cells or samples
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public GEO sample metadata; publication supplements; approved metadata tables only
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer patient IDs from cell barcodes or filenames; do not download full datasets; do not approve dataset

required_evidence: Explicit source metadata or processed-object documentation showing cell-type labels and annotation provenance
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public GEO metadata; publication methods; supplementary tables; approved metadata manifests
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not assume cell-type labels from assay type; do not run annotation; do not download full data

required_evidence: Source-documented gene identifier type and feature table compatibility for downstream pathway analysis
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public supplementary file descriptions or approved manifest metadata
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer gene identifiers from species or platform; do not download full matrix files before approval

required_evidence: Source-provided patient or donor IDs; sample IDs; cell/sample mapping sufficient for leakage-free splitting
allowed_resolution_actions: Review GEO sample metadata; HCA project metadata; publication supplements; approved manifests
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer patient IDs; do not use cell-level splitting; do not approve dataset

required_evidence: Exact source label field names; observed label values; label level; provenance for each candidate prediction task
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public sample metadata; controlled metadata summaries; publication supplements
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not guess labels from cohort name or accession; do not convert source text into patient labels without evidence

required_evidence: Source-provided SLEDAI; flare/remission; active/inactive; or equivalent activity labels at patient or sample level
allowed_resolution_actions: Review source metadata and publication supplements for exact disease activity fields
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer activity from study description; sample ordering; or disease status

required_evidence: Source-provided medication; exposure; untreated/treated status; or documented missingness
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public clinical metadata fields and publication supplements
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer treatment from disease activity; cohort; or publication narrative

required_evidence: Source-provided batch; site; library; chemistry; cohort; and processing identifiers
allowed_resolution_actions: Review GEO/HCA metadata and publication methods for exact batch variables
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer batch from accession; sample order; or file names

required_evidence: Provenance map showing whether GEO; HCA; CELLxGENE; and publication records contain overlapping donors; samples; or cells
allowed_resolution_actions: Compare source accessions; collection IDs; publication links; metadata manifests
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not treat linked records as independent cohorts without deduplication evidence

required_evidence: Cohort independence; no donor/sample/cell overlap; compatible tissue; compatible assay; compatible labels; batch metadata
allowed_resolution_actions: Build a source-supported cohort overlap and label compatibility table
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not mark external_validation_ready; do not rely on random cell-level splits

required_evidence: dbGaP access feasibility; allowed-use constraints; whether metadata can be reviewed under approved access
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public dbGaP study page and access instructions; request human decision before any access step
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not bypass access controls; do not download controlled data; do not assume usability

required_evidence: Source-supported raw count location; access status; file type; allowed use
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public metadata and dbGaP documentation; defer data access to human-approved gate
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not assume raw counts from assay type; do not download raw files

required_evidence: Source-supported processed object location; access conditions; format; allowed use
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public GEO/dbGaP metadata and publication repository links
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not treat controlled-access records as openly available; do not download processed objects

required_evidence: Source-provided disease; activity; treatment; and sample-level labels with provenance
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public metadata summaries; publication supplements; human-approved dbGaP metadata
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer labels from case/control counts or accession title

required_evidence: Exact CELLxGENE/HCA label fields; observed values; label level; provenance for donor/sample labels
allowed_resolution_actions: Review CELLxGENE/HCA metadata and publication supplements without downloading full assets
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not assume donor-level label usability from disease ontology terms alone

required_evidence: Source-provided disease activity score; flare/remission status; or active/inactive label at donor or sample level
allowed_resolution_actions: Review CELLxGENE/HCA metadata fields and publication supplements
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer activity from disease term; donor ID; or study title

required_evidence: Source-provided batch; library; processing; cohort; and site metadata sufficient for harmonization and leakage prevention
allowed_resolution_actions: Review CELLxGENE/HCA metadata manifests and publication methods
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer batch from donor ID pattern; collection ID; or dataset ID

required_evidence: Source-supported overlap map across collection ID; dataset ID; HCA project; GEO accessions; donors; samples; and cells
allowed_resolution_actions: Compare public accession links and metadata manifests; create deduplication table
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not treat CELLxGENE/HCA as independent external validation before overlap is resolved

required_evidence: Source-supported cell-type annotation fields; annotation method; ontology terms; compatibility with other candidates
allowed_resolution_actions: Review CELLxGENE metadata and publication methods
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not assume annotation quality or cross-dataset compatibility from label visibility alone

required_evidence: Source-supported feature identifier type; reference build; gene symbols or stable IDs; pathway mapping compatibility
allowed_resolution_actions: Review public metadata and approved feature metadata only
forbidden_resolution_actions: Do not infer gene identifiers from organism or H5AD visibility; do not download full H5AD before approval
